title: Hantavirus Patients Land in Amsterdam With More Cruise Ship Evacuations Planned
summary_full: Three people with possible symptoms of the disease were evacuated on Wednesday morning from the MV Hondius before it headed to the Canary Islands.
summary_public: Three people with possible symptoms of the disease were evacuated on Wednesday morning from the MV Hondius before it headed to the Canary Islands.
